title: Customer Booking System Core Feature
user_story: As a customer or administrator, I want to create, track, and manage home maintenance service bookings through the system, so that customers can schedule appointments online and administrators can oversee technician assignments and booking lifecycle.

acceptance_criteria.given: A user is accessing the booking system
acceptance_criteria.when: they attempt to access protected endpoints without authentication
acceptance_criteria.then: the system returns HTTP 401 Unauthorized with appropriate error message

be: Implement booking CRUD operations using documented REST endpoints
Add validation layer for phone format (VN standard) and date format (dd/mm/yyyy)
Create technician assignment service with conflict detection logic
fe: Build booking creation form with real-time slot availability checking
Develop booking detail view page showing appointment timeline
Implement reschedule modal with calendar picker and slot selection
qa: Test all API endpoints for correct response codes and data validation
Verify phone format validation rejects invalid VN number patterns
Confirm notification delivery for booking confirmation and status changes

definition_of_done: All acceptance criteria validated with test cases covering happy path and edge cases
API endpoints return correct HTTP status codes (201, 200, 400, 500) per documented contract
QA evidence includes successful booking creation, technician assignment, reschedule flow, and cancellation scenarios
Story-specific completion verified by end-to-end test run demonstrating full customer booking lifecycle
assumptions: Notification system exists as a separate service layer - notification endpoints not explicitly documented in retrieved context
Admin can view all bookings and technician assignments via existing admin dashboard or new management pages
Service categories are pre-configured master data that customers select from dropdown
Time slot availability is calculated based on technician capacity and predefined working hours per service type

sprint_allocation.description: Booking API implementation with validation layer
